strategies.name: FVG 5yr Best EV v1
strategies.description: Mixed mit_extreme/mid_extreme, 2Y-confirmed positive EV, ~5 trades/day. Source: NQ 5min 5Y 30min session.

strategies.name: Mixed Best EV v2
strategies.description: Cherry-picked mit_extreme + mid_extreme cells. EV>0.1, 2Y-confirmed, greedy to ~5.5 trades/day. Source: NQ 5min 5Y 30min.

strategies.name: Mixed Best EV v3
strategies.description: mit_extreme all buckets + mid_extreme 40-80pt only. 2Y-confirmed, greedy ~5 trades/day.

strategies.name: Mixed Best EV v3 +slip
strategies.description: Same as v3 but with realistic fills: entry 1 tick deeper, TP 1 tick early, SL unchanged. Models limit order fill behavior on NQ.

strategies.name: High WR 1.25-2R v1
strategies.description: R:R 1.25-2.0 only, WR>=40%, 2Y-confirmed. ~4 trades/day. mit_extreme all + mid_extreme 40-80.

strategies.name: Mixed Best EV v3 +slip split-risk
strategies.description: v3 with realistic fills. 3-tier risk: 0.5% on 5-15pt, 1% on 15-40pt, 1.5% on 40-80pt. Dec 20 hard gate.

strategies.name: Mixed Best EV v3 +slip moderate
strategies.description: v3 with realistic fills. Kelly-inspired moderate risk: 0.5% on 5-15pt, 1.5% on 15-40pt, 3% on 40-80pt. Dec 20 hard gate.
